channelIntroProgressStalled: No progress updates recently. Generation may still be running, or the worker may have stopped.
libraryFollowingEmpty: Channels you follow will appear here.
homeSearchPrompt: What do you want to listen to?
homeUpsellBody: Upgrade to Premium to create briefings on any topic you choose.
premiumSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits how you listen and create.
landingHeroTitle: Briefings you can trust. Podcasts on demand.
landingHeroSubtitle: ClearSight turns any topic into a source-verified briefing with audio and illustrations — in your language. Listen free, or create your own on demand.
landingFeature1Body: Every briefing ships with a Truth Ledger of verified sources and a reliability score.
landingFeature2Body: Pick News, Education, or Entertainment and generate a full podcast on any topic.
landingFeature3Body: Briefings, audio, and illustrations adapt to the language you choose.
landingPricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade anytime. Cancel anytime.
landingTestModeNote: Test mode: pick a plan and start instantly — no payment required.
landingPlanNote: No payment required — instant access in test mode.
landingFooter: Registration, plan selection, and login are handled right here in the app.
premiumCreditAddOnsHint: Purchase illustration credits for your briefings.
planFreeDesc: Browse and listen to existing briefings.
planPremiumDesc: Create on-demand podcast briefings on any topic.
planCreatorDesc: Full premium access plus Creator Studio.
studioEmptyHint: Create your first podcast channel to get started.
studioUpgradeBody: Upgrade to Creator to access Creator Studio.
accountDevTierHint: Switch tiers to preview Free, Premium, and Creator experiences.
upgradeRequiredBody: Upgrade to Premium to create on-demand podcast briefings.
audioFailedBody: The written briefing is ready, but audio generation didn’t complete — this is usually a temporary capacity limit. You can read it now and try generating again later.
emptySubtitle: Try adjusting your search or region.
errorCredits: You need credits to create a briefing.
errorDatabase: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
librarySubtitle: Pick up where you left off, manage your queue, and revisit podcasts you saved.
libraryWelcomeBody: Search for briefings to listen to, or create your own on-demand podcast. Saved searches, likes, and playlists will appear here.
libraryEmptyHint: Play a briefing from Discover to build your queue.
libraryLikedEmpty: Like a briefing to keep it here.
libraryPlaylistsEmpty: Build a playlist from your favorite briefings.
librarySavedSearchesEmpty: Save a search from the Discover page to revisit it fast.
libraryOnDemandEmpty: Briefings you create on demand will appear here.
libraryChannelsEmpty: Channels you publish in Studio will appear here.
libraryTopRatedEmpty: Your highest-performing briefings will appear here.
creditsExplain: Each credit unlocks one full briefing with verified sources and audio. Play saved briefings anytime at no extra cost.
howStep1Body: Pick a language, region, and topic. We surface the most relevant stories for you.
howStep2Body: Use one credit to generate a verified briefing with sources and optional audio.
howStep3Body: Saved briefings play on demand. Build a queue and listen on the go.
accountLanguageHint: Set from the language picker in the sidebar.
musicLyricsEditHint: Includes generated lyrics under "Lyrics:" — edit them freely before generating.
musicLanguageHint: Supported languages sing best. Experimental languages work by sending translated lyrics to the model.
generateTrackHint: Create an HD music track from your brief
onDemandMusicSubtitle: Describe the mood, tempo, and vibe — we will compose an HD track with Lyria.
onDemandMusicQueuedBody: This runs in the background and can take a few minutes. You can leave this page — we'll notify you when it's ready, and you can always find it in Your Library.
onDemandEpisodesEmpty: Episodes you create will appear here.
onDemandEpisodesNoMatches: No episodes match your search or filters.
searchSetCriteria: Set your criteria, then tap Discover.
searchAvailableHint: Existing podcasts for this category and language.
searchTopStoriesHintNews: Find the top trending headlines for your geo and category, then generate a briefing · 1 credit
searchTopStoriesHintEpisodes: Find top episode ideas for this selection, then generate on demand · 1 credit
searchTopStoriesEmpty: No new top stories found. Try adjusting your criteria.
topicsSearchHint: Find fresh topics to generate for this selection · 1 credit
topicsSearchError: Could not find new topics. Please try again.
topicsSearchEmpty: No new topics found. Try adjusting your criteria.
topicsInsufficientCredits: You need at least 1 credit to search for new topics.
homeSavedSearchesEmpty: Save a search to launch it here in one tap.
geoStatePlaceholder: Type a state, province, or region…
geoStateHelp: Works for any country — state, province, prefecture, or region.
geoLocalHelp: Search any city or town worldwide.
playAllHint: No saved briefings yet. Create one to start listening.
addTopicPlaceholder: e.g. Local housing policy, NBA playoffs…
addTopicFieldQuestions: Points of focus or questions (optional, up to 3)
onDemandPodcastSubtitle: Describe the episode you want. We review it for channel fit and quality, then recommend an optimized description you can approve or edit.
addTopicError: Enter a topic between 3 and 200 characters.
addTopicDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the episode you want to create: the subject, angle, and what listeners should take away…
addTopicDescriptionError: Enter a description between 10 and 1000 characters.
addTopicSelectTypeCategoryHint: Choose a type and category before describing your episode.
addTopicCategoryRequired: Choose a category before reviewing your description.
topicReviewNeedsDetailTitle: Add more detail to your description
topicReviewError: Could not review the description. Please try again.
topicReviewTransientError: We couldn’t check this description just now — this is usually a temporary hiccup. Please try again in a moment.
topicReviewPlanRequired: On-demand podcasts require a Premium or Creator plan. Upgrade to create your own episodes.
topicReviewExpectations: For best results, describe one specific episode that fits this channel’s focus: name the subject, your angle, and what listeners should take away. Keep it on-topic and within community guidelines.
topicReviewEditReReview: You edited the description — review again before creating.
topicIllustrationsHint: +2 credits. Adds illustrated scene frames you can watch as an animatic.
patternMatrixIllustrationsIncluded: Ken Burns scene illustrations are included with every Pattern Matrix episode (+2 credits).
onDemandQueuedBody: This runs in the background and can take a few minutes. You can leave this page — we’ll notify you when it’s ready, and you can always find it in Your Library.
onDemandNotifyHint: We’ll send a notification when it’s ready.
onDemandEnqueueError: Could not start generation. Please try again.
onDemandDatabaseUnavailable: Database temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
onDemandInsufficientCredits: You don’t have enough credits for this request.
animaticUnavailable: Regenerate this briefing to enable animatic.
illustrateHint: Generate a unique frame for each dialogue line (2 credits).
illustrateReadyHint: Illustrations generated — toggle them in the player.
translateHint: Generate this podcast in another language (0.5 credits). Frames are reused.
translateSubtitle: We adapt the script for cultural resonance, translate it, and regenerate the audio. The existing frames are reused.
translateReuseFramesHint: Existing illustration frames are reused — only the script and audio are regenerated.
translateWorkingBody: Adapting the script and regenerating the audio. This can take a few minutes.
translateEnqueueError: Could not start translation. Please try again.
translateFailed: Translation failed. Your credits were refunded — please try again.
translateStillRunning: Still working — we’ll notify you when it’s ready. Check your library shortly.
deletePodcastConfirm: Delete this podcast permanently? This cannot be undone.
deleteError: Could not delete the podcast. Please try again.
quizSectionSubtitle: {count} questions — test what you learned from this episode.
quizConfirmBody: Your answers will be graded and you will not see which questions were right or wrong.
quizSubmitError: Could not grade your quiz. Please try again.
quizKnowledgeScoreHint: Scored on a bell curve where 100 is average.
quizLoginToSave: Sign in to save your best score on this episode.
qaSectionSubtitle: Ask a question about this episode and a host will answer in audio and text.
qaPlaceholder: What would you like to ask the hosts about this episode?
qaRecording: The host is recording your answer…
qaError: Could not ask your question. Please try again.
qaAnswerFailed: Could not produce an answer right now. Your credit was refunded — please try again.
qaSignInRequired: Sign in to ask the hosts.
qaInsufficientCredits: You don’t have enough credits to ask a question.
qaEmpty: No questions yet. Be the first to ask the hosts.
qaQuestionLengthError: Your question must be between 10 and 500 characters.
qaPremiumRequired: Asking the hosts is a Premium and Creator feature.
qaEditReReview: You edited the question — review it again before asking.
authLoginSubtitle: Sign in to your ClearSight account.
authSignupSubtitle: Start listening to verified briefings on demand.
authForgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send you a reset link.
authForgotSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
authResetSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
authResetSuccess: Password updated. You’re now signed in.
authResetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
authDevLinkNote: Test mode — use this link to reset your password:
authPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
authGenericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
accountSignedOutHint: Sign in or create an account to manage your subscription, credits, and profile.
accountBypassNote: Test mode: subscriptions and credit purchases are auto-confirmed without payment.
accountCancelConfirm: Cancel your subscription? Your plan reverts to Free and data is retained for 60 days.
accountBuyCreditsHint: Add core generation credits to your balance.
accountDeleteHint: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
accountDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete your account? This cannot be undone.
